Way is building the first automotive services ecosystem, connecting businesses with customers who use Way for cash-back automotive benefits. Way provides customers with opportunities to save on services including parking, fuel, car wash, insurance, and repair & maintenance.

Job Title

Vice President, Marketing (India)

Experience

20+ Years

Location

India (Kochi / Bengaluru hub), with regular travel to other India offices

Employment Type

Full-Time, Permanent

Reports To

Global Head of Marketing (US Leadership)

Role Overview

Way's India marketing organization is scaling into a full-funnel growth engine spanning organic discovery, B2B demand generation, consumer/omnichannel marketing, and local partner marketing. The Vice President, Marketing – India will lead a team of 35–40 people, partnering with global leadership to execute company strategy. This role is the point of accountability for marketing delivery in India, managing four functional pillars: Organic/SEO-GEO, Business (B2B), Consumer/Omnichannel, and Local Marketing.

Key Responsibilities

Organizational & People Leadership

  • Own the India marketing organization end-to-end, including P&L, headcount, and global strategy alignment.
  • Directly manage four functional leads and cross-functional teams.
  • Assess team capabilities, define org structure, and oversee hiring, onboarding, and career development.
  • Act as the primary India counterpart to US product and growth marketing teams.

Strategy & Operations

  • Translate global strategy into quarterly roadmaps and weekly execution plans with clear KPIs.
  • Own India marketing operating cadence (all-hands, leadership reviews, KPI reporting).
  • Drive data-driven, decisive execution for a fast-scaling, multi-vertical business.
  • Co-author the overall Way marketing plan with the EVP Marketing and report quarterly on initiatives.

SEO / Organic Growth

  • Lead SEO/GEO rankings, organic revenue, app store rank, backlinks, and affiliate revenue.
  • Ensure technical SEO/UI-UX content teams have resources and cross-functional support.
  • Personally audit SEO and AI-search visibility work.

B2B Marketing

  • Own MQL volume, deal acceleration, business supply, and SaaS revenue targets.
  • Oversee HubSpot marketing operations, list building, thought leadership, and sales materials.
  • Build brand visibility with credit unions, banks, insurance companies, and gig-economy partners.

B2C Marketing

  • Own consumer revenue, member growth, app downloads, brand awareness, and engagement.
  • Oversee evolution from email marketing to omnichannel programs (Klaviyo, paid social, unified data).
  • Direct social media, email, and digital marketing teams for consumer demand generation.

Local Marketing

  • Oversee internal local marketing agency for car washes, parking garages, and repair shops.
  • Ensure listing/directory management, local content, location-based campaigns, and customer websites.
  • Own customer satisfaction and churn KPIs for local marketing.

Agency & Budget Management

  • Command center for external agencies/vendors across SEO, content, and digital channels.
  • Negotiate contracts, enforce timelines, and manage India marketing budget for highest-impact initiatives.

Cross-Functional Programs

  • Oversee market research, content editing, and management trainee programs.
  • Prioritize cross-vertical deliverables across all four pillars.

Preferred Skills

  • 20+ years of progressive marketing experience, including 8+ years leading multi-function teams (SEO, B2B, consumer, local).
  • Proven experience running a marketing organization end-to-end (budget, hiring, vendor management).
  • Deep strength in one core discipline (SEO, B2B, consumer) and fluency in others.
  • Track record of scaling organic traffic, lead generation, or consumer revenue.
  • Proficiency with HubSpot, Klaviyo, Google Search Console/Analytics, Ahrefs, SEMrush.
  • Experience managing India teams with US/global leadership; comfortable across time zones.
  • Decisive, structured, execution-obsessed leader with occasional travel to India offices and the US.
  • Bachelor's in Marketing/Business; MBA preferred.

Why This Role Is Special

  • Full ownership of Way's India marketing organization with direct global leadership access.
  • Authority to shape India's growth engine across SEO, B2B, consumer, and local marketing.
  • High-impact role during Way's expansion into new business lines and marketing tactics.

Email: careers@way.com

Company: ZenturioTech Pvt Ltd Location: Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management - Kerala (IIITMK), 3rd Floor, Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, 695581 Website: https://zenturiotech.com Closing Date: 31, July 2026 Contact Email: admin@zenturiotech.com

Job Title: Management Trainee

Brief Description

We are seeking a highly motivated Management Trainee to join our team. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain practical exposure across multiple business functions while working on real business challenges and strategic initiatives. The selected candidate will undergo structured on-the-job learning, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and support business operations, project execution, process improvement, and organizational growth. The ideal candidate is curious, adaptable, analytical, and eager to build a successful career in management within a fast-paced and collaborative environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support daily business operations and ensure assigned tasks are completed efficiently.
  • Assist in planning, coordinating, and executing business projects.
  • Work closely with departments such as HR, Operations, Marketing, Business Development, Administration, and Technology based on business requirements.
  • Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and business research to support decision-making.
  • Prepare presentations, documentation, meeting minutes, and project updates.
  • Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth communication and timely project delivery.
  • Monitor project progress and provide regular status updates.
  • Identify opportunities to improve workflows, productivity, and operational efficiency.
  • Support process documentation, policy implementation, and quality initiatives.
  • Participate in meetings, training sessions, workshops, and knowledge-sharing activities.
  • Build strong professional relationships with internal stakeholders.
  • Demonstrate ownership, accountability, professionalism, and a continuous learning mindset.
  • Perform additional responsibilities assigned by the reporting manager.

Preferred Skills

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field.
  • 0 to 1 year of experience. Freshers are welcome to apply.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills.
  • Good analytical, critical thinking, and problem-solving abilities.
  • Basic knowledge of Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively.
  • Willingness to learn new business processes and technologies.
  • Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills.
  • Leadership potential and a proactive attitude.
  • Excellent interpersonal and coordination skills.
  • Attention to detail and commitment to quality.
  • Adaptability and willingness to work across multiple business functions.
  • Basic understanding of business operations and project management.
  • Ability to analyze information and recommend practical solutions.
  • Professional work ethic with a positive attitude.

What You Will Gain

  • Structured learning and hands-on business experience.
  • Exposure to multiple business functions and real-world projects.
  • Mentorship from experienced professionals.
  • Opportunities to develop leadership, communication, analytical, and project management skills.
  • A collaborative and innovation-focused work environment.
  • Career growth and advancement opportunities based on performance.
  • Continuous learning through challenging assignments and professional development.

Who Should Apply

  • Fresh graduates and candidates with up to 1 year of experience.
  • Individuals passionate about learning and building a career in management.
  • Candidates who enjoy solving problems and working on diverse business challenges.
  • Self-driven professionals with a positive attitude and willingness to take ownership.
  • Individuals who thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced, and collaborative workplace.

Join ZenturioTech Private Limited and begin your journey toward becoming a future business leader.
